idea-plugin.name: AI Task Manager
idea-plugin.description:
AI Task Manager

Orchestrate AI-driven, file-by-file investigations across your project — without ever leaving the IDE. Run a single AI search to discover candidate files, then queue per-file follow-up tasks that execute one-at-a-time or in parallel with full progress tracking, per-task logs, and ZIP export/import.

Highlights

  • Two-step workflow — search prompt → file list → per-file follow-ups.
  • Tool window with three tabs: Search (task list, action toolbar, progress + ETA), Log (live stream filterable by task), Configuration (provider, templates, exclusion globs, reset).
  • Configurable parallelism — strictly serial by default, dial up to 64 worker threads.
  • Send to AI Task Manager — contribute files from the IDE's Find in Files / Find Usages right-click menu (honours per-row exclude/uncheck state).
  • Round-trip ZIP export/import — tasks and log lines are saved and restored.
  • Per-row "review log" icon — jump straight to the Log tab filtered to that task.

Supported AI providers

  • Claude CLI — @anthropic-ai/claude-code (recommended)
  • GitHub Copilot CLI — via the gh copilot extension

Command templates use {binary}, {prompt}, {file} and {projectDir} placeholders so you can fully control how the CLI is invoked.

Source & docs: github.com/dimonlemon364-lab/ai-task-manager
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.1 — Marketplace compatibility

  • Removed all @ApiStatus.Internal API references that the JetBrains Marketplace verifier rejects on upload.
  • "Send to AI Task Manager" now prefers the rows you select in the Find Results panel before falling back to the full result set.

0.1.0 — Initial public release

  • AI Task Manager tool window with Search / Log / Configuration tabs.
  • Providers: Claude CLI and GitHub Copilot CLI.
  • Two-step workflow (search → per-file tasks), parallel execution, ETA, per-row play/stop/recycle and "review log" icon.
  • "Send to AI Task Manager" action in the Find in Files / Find Usages right-click menu.
  • Round-trip ZIP export/import — restores tasks AND log lines.
  • Configuration tab — provider templates with {binary}/{prompt}/{file}/{projectDir} placeholders, exclusion globs, search-output regex, Reset Configuration button.

action.description: Send the current Find in Files results to the AI Task Manager search tab
